textByHashes.286e8f79a9dc72936bcf4ab060131d7b63283453: Well. This beats doing the shopping!
textByHashes.ccc8696a399e268c3952b80ab1e1cb82fa2c1adf: I wouldn't want to be the poor guy that has to clean up after the duels.
textByHashes.a2f4c66e56a03eccbfdba7103bac1a010ab0880f: What did the skeleton say before it ate?
textByHashes.1b55ca6ad107cbf00332dae6379f7942c4c01023: How can you make a very lively hankerchief?
textByHashes.c8a2ed399c78b9808d65ad96ecde55737de09220: Put a little boogey in it.
textByHashes.fefa0a8263550e91eadd0cfb170ac55340aa0c5e: 'Cause it didn't have the guts to fart!
textByHashes.6f30ad6bf68beb5d7a6aedf9579999a4433779bc: My son just won his first duel!
textByHashes.2d89a98f964156ae38aabc0829d7dd71f1c46897: He ripped his opponent in half!
textByHashes.9917951c8f55420b33b6f54861dd964daa3df045: Can't you see I'm watching the duels?
textByHashes.b17291a418ec9d3077cb27d91d52663d0c34a051: Hi! I'm here to watch the duels!
textByHashes.d3e3a003334ff49161ef0a41d3823ab6909f3cba: Did you know they think this place dates back to the second age?!
textByHashes.670bf0bc32e5e4ffb64fed1ede8e2c08474c9797: Yeah. The guy at the information kiosk was telling me.
